seo.title: Wildwood Park Open Sculpture Exhibition — September 2026 | Metro Little Rock Events
seo.description: Explore Wildwood Park's annual outdoor sculpture exhibition across 77 acres of natural landscape. Self-guided tours of original works by regional and national artists.

description: Wildwood Park's annual outdoor sculpture exhibition places original works by regional and national artists throughout the 77-acre wooded campus for a two-month installation. The self-guided experience is one of the metro's most distinctive art events — sculptures appear around bends in the trail, beside the creek, and in the outdoor amphitheater space, creating a conversation between art and landscape. Opening weekend (September 19–20) features artist talks and a self-guided tour map. The park grounds are free and open daily during the exhibition. Sculptures vary each year; past exhibitions have ranged from abstract steel to large-scale ceramics.
